en: Name 5 things you can see around you in your room or compound.
Name 4 things you can feel with your body.
Name 3 sounds you can hear right now.
Name 1 thing you can taste or one calm word you can say.
tw: Ka nneɛma 5 a wuhu wɔ wo dan mu anaa wo compound mu.
Ka nneɛma 4 a wote wɔ wo nipadua mu.
Ka nne 3 a wote seesei ara.
Ka nneɛma 2 a wotumi hu ne hua.
Ka ade 1 a wote dɛ anaa asɛm baako a ɛma wo bo dwo.
